channel.title: Home on Laia Giralt Solé
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Laia Giralt Solé

item.title: Education
item.description:
🎓 Cornell University

M.Eng. in Data Science & Decision Analytics · New York, NY · May 2026

Honors & Recognition:

  • Merit Scholarship recipient
  • GPA: 3.93

Relevant Coursework:

  • Applied Machine Learning
  • Applied Data Science
  • Optimization Methods
  • Revenue Management

Key Achievements:

  • Engineered deep learning pipeline with 73.9% F1 score on 87K+ ECG classifications
  • Specialized in data science, machine learning, optimization, and research methodologies
  • Conducting research at the Interaction Research Lab

Location: Cornell Tech, New York, NY

item.title: Experience
item.description:
Professional Journey

I’ve worked on impactful projects spanning research, data analysis, and machine learning. Here’s how I’ve grown as a data scientist.

🤖 Interaction Research Lab, Cornell Tech

Independent Researcher · New York, NY · December 2025 – Present

Collaborating on human-AI interaction research for real-world deployment in retail environments.

What I’m doing:

  • Architecting data models and storage strategies for multimodal data (interaction logs, sensor data, video)
  • Designing longitudinal study metrics to evaluate robot social capabilities
  • Conducting exploratory analyses of interaction patterns and social behaviors

Skills applied: Data engineering, Research design, Database architecture, Data exploration

item.title: Projects
item.description:
I love solving real-world problems with data. Here’s where I’ve applied machine learning, statistical analysis, and data engineering to drive meaningful results.

📊 Data Analytics Competition

DataFest — CourseKata Engagement Analysis - Won “Best Insight Award” at a data competition. Analyzed 1.5 GB of educational engagement data to discover what drives learning.

Key Finding: Interactive content drove ~70% increase in time-on-page compared to static pages.

Tech: Python, Statistical correlation analysis, Data visualization, Storytelling

item.title: Resume
item.description:

Laia Giralt Solé — Resume (Summary)

New York, NY • 518-888-0399 • l03gira@cornell.edu • linkedin.com/in/laiagiraltsole/

Education

  • Cornell Tech, Cornell University — M.Eng. in Data Science and Decision Analytics (May 2026)
    • Merit Scholarship • GPA: 3.93
    • Relevant coursework: Applied Machine Learning, Applied Data Science, Optimization Methods, Revenue Management
  • Siena University — B.S. in Data Science and Computer Science (May 2025)
    • GPA: 3.98 • Academic Excellence Award in Data Science

Technical Skills

  • Languages: Python, SQL, Java, R
  • Tools & Platforms: Microsoft Office Suite, Excel, Figma, Generative AI

Professional Experience

  • Interaction Research Lab, Cornell Tech — Independent Research (Dec 2025 – Present)
